name: Ace of Spades
flavorText: "Folding was never an option." —Cayde-6

trait.name: Memento Mori
trait.description: Reloading after a kill loads magazine with a few extra-damage bullets. Grants radar while aiming down sights.

catalysts.name: Ace of Spades Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Funeral Pyre
effects.description: Firefly deals more damage while Memento Mori is active.

name: Ager's Scepter
flavorText: "One day, you will mold the world to your liking, dear brother, as I always have." —Queen Mara Sov

trait.name: Ager's Call
trait.description: Final blows with this weapon generate a slowing burst around the defeated target.

catalysts.name: Ager's Scepter Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat combatants while using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

Defeating combatants with precision damage will unlock this objective faster.

Defeating combatants in the Shattered Realm and Astral Alignment grants bonus progress.

effects.name: Will Given Form
effects.description: [Alternate Weapon Action]  : Drain Super energy, overflowing the magazine and empowering the beam with bonus damage and the ability to slow and freeze targets until the magazine or Super energy runs out, or the weapon is stowed. Can only be activated when Super energy is full.

name: Alethonym
flavorText: I know your name.

trait.name: Harvester Spike
trait.description: This weapon fires a Harvester Spike projectile. Dealing final blows with this weapon creates a single Vestige at the target's location. Impaling more powerful combatants with the projectile creates a steady stream of Vestiges from the target.

catalysts.name: Alethonym Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: One for All
effects.description: Hitting three separate targets increases damage for a moderate duration.

name: Anarchy
flavorText: "Stick to wall, ground, human… then FFFFFRRRRRYYYYY! Hehehehehehehe." —Siviks, Lost to None

trait.name: Arc Traps
trait.description: Grenades stick to surfaces and chain Arc bolts to other mines.

catalysts.name: Anarchy Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Jolting Feedback
effects.description:
Dealing repeated damage with this weapon inflicts Jolt. 

While amplified, Jolt is applied faster.

name: Arbalest
flavorText: "We didn't have linear fusions in the Dark Age. But we made it work." —The Drifter

trait.name: Compounding Force
trait.description: Fires slugs that cause massive damage to combatant shields. Strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions.

catalysts.name: Arbalest Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Genesis
effects.description: Breaking a combatant's shield with this weapon fills its magazine from reserves. Energy weapons regenerate ammo on hit when matching the damage type to the combatant's shield.

effects.name: Handling
effects.description: +20 Handling

effects.name: Magazine
effects.description: +30 Magazine

name: Bad Juju
flavorText: "If you believe your weapon wants to end all existence, then so it will." —Toland the Shattered

trait.name: String of Curses
trait.description: Kills refill the magazine, increase damage for a short duration, and grant Super energy based on the strength of String of Curses. Fires full-auto.

catalysts.name: Bad Juju Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain an additional perk.

Defeat targets using Bad Juju to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Unending Curse
effects.description: Extends the duration of String of Curses.

name: Barrow-Dyad
flavorText: Lay those unquiet thoughts to rest.

trait.name: Panic Response
trait.description: This weapon generates blight as it deals damage. While not firing, blight depletes, and the magazine is gradually refilled. Reload the weapon to convert stored blight into Blighted Seekers.

name: Bastion
flavorText: "The final stand is wherever I plant my feet. Not one step more." —Saint-14

trait.name: Saint's Fists
trait.description:
Rapidly fires 3 spreads of pure force.

After a successful melee hit, this weapon gains increased damage, reduced charge time, and improved reload speed for a short duration. Hitting a target with most of the pellets in a burst increases melee damage for a short duration.

catalysts.name: Bastion Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Cast No Shadows
effects.description: Dealing melee damage increases this weapon's handling and loads a small amount of ammo from reserves.

name: Black Talon
flavorText: "His life brought peace to the Reef. His death brings a sword." —Crows of the Black Hull

trait.name: Crow's Wings
trait.description: [Heavy Attack]  : Fire a Heavy projectile attack that suppresses targets. Hitting a target already suppressed spreads the effect to nearby targets.

catalysts.name: Black Talon Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Reversal
effects.description: Dealing damage to Void debuffed targets increases this weapon's damage for a short time per each type of Void debuff affecting the target.

name: Borealis
flavorText: Light is a spectrum. Why limit yourself to a single hue?

trait.name: The Fundamentals
trait.description: [Alternate Weapon Action]  : Changes this weapon's damage type, cycling between Void, Arc, and Solar. Grants this weapon temporarily increased damage when you apply or gain an elemental buff or debuff that matches this weapon's damage type.

catalysts.name: Borealis Catalyst
catalysts.description:
An Exotic catalyst can be inserted into this socket.

Check the Exotic catalysts section in Triumphs to learn where the catalyst can be obtained.

effects.name: Shield Disorient
effects.description: Energy matched shield explosion disorients nearby combatants.

effects.name: Reload Speed
effects.description: +20 Reload Speed

name: Buried Bloodline
flavorText: Shallow graves give way to old vendettas and hungry claims.

trait.name: Hungering Quarrel
trait.description: Double fires tracking bolts. Landing bolts leeches health from the target.

catalysts.description:

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Splitvein Lineage
effects.description: While Devour is active, this weapon weakens on hit.

name: Centrifuse
flavorText: Breakthrough, or broken?

trait.description: Sprinting, sliding, and firing this weapon builds a temporary electrostatic charge, increasing range and reload speed. Final blows with high charge cause explosions, and maximum charge explosions blind targets.

catalysts.name: Centrifuse Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Static Buildup
effects.description: While amplified, this weapon gradually gains overcharge.

name: Cerberus+1
flavorText: "Because three heads are good, but four are better." —Jeza "Jeopardy" Verlayn

trait.name: Four-Headed Dog
trait.description: Shoots erratic bullets from all gun barrels at the same time.

catalysts.name: Cerberus+1 Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Focused Fire
effects.description: After a final blow with this weapon, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to return ammo to the magazine and swap to a tighter spread that deals increased damage.

name: Choir of One
flavorText: A voice. A choice. An invitation.

trait.name: Command Frame
trait.description: Fires extended-range, heavy-caliber projectiles at a reduced rate of fire. Deals increased precision damage when aiming down sights.

catalysts.name: Choir of One Refits
catalysts.description: Subsistence

effects.name: Subsistence
effects.description: Defeating targets partially reloads the magazine from reserves.

effects.name: Onslaught
effects.description: Final blows with this weapon increase its rate of fire.

name: Cloudstrike
flavorText: They return to moons devoid. Their eyes searching. It's just begun. Meet this storm of sound and fury, till thunder-clashes fade to silence.

trait.name: Mortal Polarity
trait.description: Precision final blows generate a lightning bolt at the target's location and grant a moderate amount of Bolt Charge.

catalysts.name: Cloudstrike Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Triple Tap
effects.description: Rapidly landing precision hits will return one round to the magazine.

effects.name: Handling
effects.description: +25 Handling

name: Coldheart
flavorText: The latest Omolon engineering leverages liquid fuel as coolant to keep weapon systems at biting subzero temperatures.

trait.name: Cold Fusion
trait.description: This weapon shoots a steady cold-fusion-powered Arc laser, dealing more damage the longer it remains on a target.

catalysts.name: Coldheart Catalyst
catalysts.description: Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

effects.description:
While amplified, ammo is gradually transferred from reserves to the magazine. 

While in Speed Booster, ammo regenerates faster and overflows the magazine.

effects.name: Stability
effects.description: +20 Stability

effects.name: Reload Speed
effects.description: +20 Reload Speed

flavorText: "What The Witness gave me, I give to you. May it serve you in death, or in finality. It cannot be both." —Rhulk, disciple of the Witness

trait.description: This weapon stores Void debuffs when damaging foes, leeching them directly when the target is suppressed, weakened, or volatile. Once charged, [Alternate Weapon Action]  to cause damage from this weapon and to apply the stored debuffs.

catalysts.name: Collective Obligation Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Repulsor Brace
effects.description: Defeating a Void-debuffed target grants an overshield.

name: Conditional Finality
flavorText: You will dream of me… I will never leave you…

trait.name: Split Decision
trait.description: Dual barrels split into Stasis and Solar damage. Strong against [Stagger] Unstoppable Champions.

catalysts.name: Conditional Finality Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.description: Reloading shortly after dealing a final blow grants Cure to you and your nearby allies.

effects.name: Rimestealer
effects.description: Destroying a Stasis crystal or defeating a frozen target with this weapon grants you Frost Armor.

name: Crimson
flavorText: According to official Vanguard policy, this weapon does not exist.

trait.name: Banned Weapon
trait.description: This weapon fires a 3-round burst.

catalysts.name: Crimson Catalyst
catalysts.description:
An Exotic catalyst can be inserted into this socket.

Check the Exotic catalysts section in Triumphs to learn where the catalyst can be obtained.

effects.name: To the Pain
effects.description:
While this weapon is equipped, taking damage increases handling and aim assist until the weapon is stowed.

Taking more damage increases the effect.

effects.name: Range
effects.description: +20 Range

name: Cryosthesia 77K
flavorText: There are things colder than cold.

trait.name: LN2 Burst

catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.description: Shattering a frozen target refills this weapon's magazine from reserves.

flavorText: "…Cull's death will draw those most eager to tempt Darkness. All is proceeding as we envision." —Teben Grey

trait.description: Final blows or rapid hits with this weapon's frontal blades heal you and provide Soulfire Charges, which cause rounds fired by this weapon to inflict potent corruption. These frontal blades deal increased damage to targets afflicted by corruption.

name: D.A.R.C.I.
flavorText: Thank you for using the Data Analysis, Reconnaissance, and Cooperative Intelligence device. You may call me Darci.

trait.name: Personal Assistant
trait.description:
Aim at a target to view their health and other critical information in the scope.
Jolts targets when dealing damage. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

catalysts.name: D.A.R.C.I. Catalyst
catalysts.description: When upgraded to a Masterwork, this weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

effects.name: Networked Targeting
effects.description: While Personal Assistant is active, hits grant this weapon and nearby allies' non-Exotic Sniper Rifles increased overall weapon performance and precision damage. Granting maximum stacks of the effect to an ally grants this weapon bonus damage.

effects.name: Stability
effects.description: +20 Stability

name: Dead Man's Tale
flavorText: "Long, short, they all end the same way." —Katabasis

trait.name: Cranial Spike
trait.description: Chaining precision hits grants bonus target acquisition, range, rounds reloaded, and damage against combatants.

catalysts.name: Dead Man's Tale Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

Opening Hidden Caches during Exotic quest "Presage" will unlock this objective faster.

effects.name: Dark-Forged Trigger
effects.description: Removes hipfire accuracy penalties while increasing rate of fire. At maximum stacks of Cranial Spike, hipfiring deals increased damage.

name: Dead Messenger
flavorText: A gift for the empress who has everything.

trait.name: Trinary Vision
trait.description: One-shot handheld Grenade Launcher. Projectiles release a fan of three energy waves on contact with the ground.

catalysts.name: Dead Messenger Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat combatants while using this weapon in Arc, Solar, and Void modes to unlock this upgrade.

Defeating combatants in the Throne World or Battlegrounds will unlock these objectives faster. Defeating Champions provides bonus progress to all 3 objectives.

effects.name: Turnabout
effects.description: Using this weapon to break the shield of a combatant or a Guardian using their Super will grant you an overshield.

name: Deathbringer
flavorText: "Sing them a lullaby of death and nothing more."

trait.description:
Fires remotely detonated projectiles that drop Void orbs on combatants.
[Shoot]  : Fire; release to detonate.

catalysts.name: Deathbringer Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Dead Weight
effects.description: Increases how quickly Dark Descent reaches its full potential.

name: Delicate Tomb
flavorText: The danger within is repulsive to us.

trait.name: Traitor's Vessel
trait.description:
Fires a wide horizontal spread when shot from the hip.
Final blows with this weapon have a chance to generate Ionic Traces. Powerful foes and opposing Guardians always generate Ionic Traces.

catalysts.name: Delicate Tomb Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Ionic Interment
effects.description: Collecting an Ionic Trace partially reloads the magazine from reserves.

name: Deterministic Chaos
flavorText: "So all being is a one and only being; and that it continues to be when someone dies, tells you, that he did not cease to be." —Schrodinger's epitaph

trait.description: Strong against [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions. While holding down the trigger, every fourth Heavy Metal projectile also weakenstargets on impact. Releasing the trigger after a Vexadecimal projectile partially reloads this weapon's magazine from reserves.

catalysts.name: Deterministic Chaos Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.description: Damage increases the longer this weapon remains on a target.

flavorText: "Press on! The Devils will rue the day they came to our doors!" —Lord Shaxx

catalysts.name: Devil's Ruin Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

Collecting an Elemental pickup or destroying a Tangle grants this weapon a stacking period of increased damage. Throwing a Tangle provides additional time.

Elemental pickups include [Solar]Firesprites, [Void]Void Breaches, [Arc]Ionic Traces, [Stasis]Stasis Shards, and [Strand]Strand Tangles.

name: Divinity
flavorText: Calibrate reality. Seek inevitability. Embody divinity.

trait.name: Judgment
trait.description: Sustained damage with this weapon envelops the target in a field that weakens and stuns them. Strong against [Disruption] Overload Champions.

effects.description:
Dealing repeated damage with this weapon inflicts Jolt. 

While amplified, Jolt is applied faster.

effects.name: Focused Fury
effects.description: Dealing a portion of the magazine as precision damage grants this weapon bonus damage. The shot count is reset whenever the weapon is reloaded or stowed.

name: Dragon's Breath
flavorText: Burn the world. Burn it all.

catalysts.name: Dragon's Breath Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Pyromancer
effects.description: This weapon replenishes its fuel faster. Defeating targets with this weapon causes them to periodically drop Firesprites.

name: Duality
flavorText: "The question becomes whether or not to fire, not where to aim." —Osiris

trait.name: Compression Chamber
trait.description: Fires a pellet spread in hip-fire or a single high-damage slug while aiming.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Magazine
effects.description: +50 Magazine

effects.name: Range
effects.description: +20 Range

catalysts.description: Defeating a Void-debuffed target grants an overshield.

effects.name: Repulsor Brace

catalysts.description: Temporarily increases reload speed and handling after sprinting or while amplified. This effect is improved when you are amplified.

effects.name: Eddy Current
effects.description: Temporarily increases reload speed and handling after sprinting or while amplified. This effect is improved when you are amplified.

trait.description:
Final blows with this weapon grant stacks of Gathering Light, improving guard stats and lunge range.
Stowing this weapon consumes all stacks, granting melee, grenade, and class ability energy.

column1.name: Aggressive Frame

column1.name: Caster Frame
column1.description:
[Heavy Attack]  : Launch a heavy projectile attack.
Heavy attacks are stronger with full energy.

column1.name: Vortex Frame
column1.description:
[Heavy Attack]  : Launch a heavy spin attack.
Heavy attacks are stronger with full energy.

column2.description: Heavy attacks mark targets; light attacks detonate them.

name: Eriana's Vow
flavorText: A light in the dark.

catalysts.name: Eriana's Vow Catalyst
catalysts.description:

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.description: Increases magazine size. Holstering this weapon automatically reloads it after a short period of time.

effects.name: Magazine
effects.description: +30 Magazine

name: Euphony
flavorText: Perhaps The Final Shape is not silence, it is a symphony.

catalysts.name: Euphony Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Enlightened Action
effects.description: Dealing damage improves reload speed and handling.

name: Ex Diris

trait.name: Corrupted Nucleosynthesis
trait.description: This weapon enrages when dealing or taking sustained damage, gaining increased rate of fire while enraged.

catalysts.name: Ex Diris Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Berserk Rush
effects.description: Weapon enrages faster while amplified. Final blows with this weapon make you amplified.

name: Eyes of Tomorrow
flavorText: "I want to see it all, unhindered, and know it's mine to take." —Clovis Bray

trait.name: Eyes on All
trait.description: This weapon is capable of tracking and firing at multiple targets simultaneously.

catalysts.name: Eyes of Tomorrow Catalyst
catalysts.description:

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

effects.name: Blast Distributor

catalysts.name: Fafnir Catalyst
catalysts.description:

Defeat targets using this weapon to unlock this upgrade.

name: Fighting Lion

trait.name: Delayed Gratification
trait.description:
Grenade projectiles will bounce off surfaces.
[Shoot]  : Fire; release to detonate.

catalysts.description: When upgraded to a Masterwork, this weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.

effects.name: Chimera
effects.description: After this weapon fires, equipped Kinetic and Power weapons gain a brief period of increased handling and accuracy.

effects.name: Reload Speed

name: Final Warning

catalysts.name: Final Warning Catalyst
catalysts.description:
Upgrades this weapon to a Masterwork. Once upgraded, the weapon will obtain enhanced capabilities, such as increased stats and/or additional perks.
